channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 16, 2024
item.description: The guys pick four CIF state championship games involving Bay Area teams, including Pittsburg/Lincoln-San Diego, Amador Valley/Frontier-Bakersfield, Moreau Catholic/Lindsay, De La Salle/Mater Dei-Santa Ana
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Gastineau confronts Favre in documentary for his 'dive' on Strahan's record-breaking sack
item.description: Former New York Jets star Mark Gastineau confronted Brett Favre last year at a memorabilia show and angrily accused the Pro Football Hall of Fame quarterback of deliberately going down on a record-breaking sack.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Guardians trade Gold Glove 2B Andrés Giménez to Blue Jays, get RHP Luis Ortiz in deal with Pirates
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cleveland Guardians broke up their infield and plugged a hole in their rotation.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 39 as Thunder beat Mavericks 118-104, advance to NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 39 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Dallas Mavericks 118-104 on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup quarterfinal.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers agree on $75 million, 3-year deal to keep RHP Nathan Eovaldi, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Texas Rangers have accomplished one of their primary offseason goals with a deal to re-sign Nathan Eovaldi, the winning pitcher in their 2023 World Series clincher.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: MLB investigated to ensure no early Sasaki deal in place, pitcher likely to pick team mid-January
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Major League Baseball investigated to ensure no team had an advance deal in place for Roki Sasaki, and the agent for the Japanese pitcher said picking a club will be “like the draft in reverse.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lindsey Vonn will serve as a forerunner, test out the course before World Cup races at Beaver Creek
item.description: Lindsey Vonn will test out the downhill and super-G courses as a forerunner before the World Cup races this weekend in Beaver Creek, Colorado. The U.S. Ski Team confirmed her role Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Girls Basketball: Clairemont 24, Preuss 18
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball in Clairemont with Preuss dribbling against the Chieftains. A low scoring defensive game went the way for the home team with Clairemont winning 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Point Loma 36, Mar Vista 22
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in Point Loma with the Pointers hosting Mar Vista. Pointers win this one 36-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Robbie Gould announced as head football coach at Saint Viator HS
item.description: Former Chicago Bears kicker and franchise great Robbie Gould has been named the new head football coach at Saint Viator High School in Arlington Heights, and will begin his role immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Nolan Arenado open to switch from third base to first and leaving Cardinals for a team he approves
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Nolan Arenado is open to a trade from the St. Louis Cardinals, at age 33 wanting to be on a World Series contender. “It’s like his biological clock is ticking,” agent Joel Wolfe said Tuesday at the winter meetings.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs Hall of Famer Ryne Sandberg says cancer has returned, spread
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Hall of Fame second baseman Ryne Sandberg says the prostate cancer he thought had been eliminated by radiation has returned and spread. The Chicago Cubs great made the announcement on Instagram on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Green Bay Packers sign Michael Jordan to their practice squad — the offensive lineman
item.description: The Green Bay Packers have signed Michael Jordan to their practice squad. But before Chicago sports fans bemoan the most legendary athlete in city history going to the city's most hated rival, relax: It's not THAT Michael Jordan. For one, he didn't play football. For another, he's 61 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Burrow, Chase lift Bengals after botched blocked punt by Cowboys in 27-20 Cincinnati victory
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals finally got a break. The Dallas Cowboys had flashbacks to one of the most painful moments in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Silver Pigskin Finalist starts at Quarterback for Iowa Hawkeyes
item.description: Most walk-on players in college football never get the opportunity to take the field, especially not at quarterback, and certainly not for a Power Four football program like the Iowa Hawkeyes. But La Jolla alum Jackson Stratton has done just that.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: 7 of the world’s best soccer clubs will play at the Rose Bowl in 2025
item.description: The FIFA Club World Cup 2025 is being hosted in the United States, and one of the venues selected to host group stage matches is the Rose Bowl. Matches at the Rose Bowl are scheduled for June 15, 17, 19, 21, 23 and 25, officials announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kalani Sitake signs long-term contract extension
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 10-2 season, BYU has signed head coach Kalani Sitake to a long-term contract extension that will keep him in Provo well into the future.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL QB Jayden Daniels scores Christmas toys for kids in San Bernardino
item.description: What does a rising star in the NFL do when his team is on its bye week? Washington Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels decided to make sure the kids back home have a great holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Haliburton scores 23 points as the Pacers beat the Bulls 132-123
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton had 23 points and eight assists, and the Indiana Pacers stopped a four-game slide with a 132-123 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night. Pascal Siakam scored 21 points for Indiana, and Bennedict Mathurin finished with 19.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State expected to hire Bronco Mendenhall
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Bronco Mendenhall is coming back to Utah. Utah State is expected to announce the former BYU head coach as its new head football coach as soon as Friday. ESPN reporter Pete Thamel was the first to break the news.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes sweep College of Charleston in NCAA Tournament
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's incredible turnaround season isn't done yet. After going 11-19 in 2023, the Utes Volleyball team has advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after a three-set sweep over the College of Charleston Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: (AP) -- Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
